author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone 

  COPA IS TOMORROW!!  

Whether you're in a guild, looking for a guild, spying on other guilds or acting a lone wolf; COPA is going to be an event you don't want to miss.

Come witness this historic event unfold starting at 10:00 AM EST / 2:00 PM UTC on Thursday, June 16th!

What is COPA?
COPA is an event where Star Atlas guilds will be competing against each other to see who has the best plans in the galaxy. Guilds will present their plans to everyone and a panel of galactic judges will vote on who the best presentation was at the end.

During COPA, there will also be a chance to win an INCREDIBLE Star Atlas branded PC created by iBuyPower!

Reminder: If you'd like to get notified on everything COPA, go react to the role in ⁠unknown to stay up to speed.
